items.title: RTX Corporation: A Resilient Aerospace Stock To Buy
1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 to Brush Off
items.description: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.
